00">
        Go Home
      </Link>
    </div>
  );
};

export default NotFound;
```
New String: ```
import React from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { BookOpen } from 'lucide-react';

const NotFound: React.FC = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-rose-50 to-amber-50 px-6">
      <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-slate-100 rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
        <BookOpen size={36} className="text-slate-300" />
      </div>
      <h1 className="text-4xl font-black text-slate-800 mb-2">Lost?</h1>
      <p className="text-slate-500 mb-8 text-center">This page doesn't exist in our storybook.</p>
      <motion.button
        whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
        onClick={() => navigate('/')}
        className="bg-rose-500 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg"
      >
        Go Home
      </motion.button>
    </div>
  );
};

export default NotFound;

<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/apollo-client.d.ts]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
declare module '@apollo/client' {
  export { ApolloClient, InMemoryCache, createHttpLink, gql } from '@apollo/client/index.js';
  export { ApolloProvider } from '@apollo/client/react/context/ApolloProvider.js';
  export { useQuery, useMutation, useLazyQuery } from '@apollo/client/react/hooks/index.js';
}

declare module '@apollo/client/link/context' {
  export { setContext } from '@apollo/client/link/context/index.js';
}
```
New String: ```
declare module '@apollo/client' {
  export class ApolloClient<T = any> {
    constructor(options: any);
    query(options: any): Promise<{ data?: any; errors?: any[] }>;
    mutate(options: any): Promise<{ data?: any; errors?: any[] }>;
    resetStore(): Promise<any[]>;
  }
  export class InMemoryCache {
    constructor(options?: any);
  }
  export function createHttpLink(options: any): any;
  export function gql(literals: TemplateStringsArray, ...args: any[]): any;
  export function useQuery(query: any, options?: any): { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any; refetch: any };
  export function useMutation(mutation: any, options?: any): [any, { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any }];
  export function useLazyQuery(query: any, options?: any): [any, { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any }];
}

declare module '@apollo/client/link/context' {
  export function setContext(setter: (operation: any, prevContext: any) => any): any;
}

declare module '@apollo/client/react/context' {
  export const ApolloProvider: React.FC<{ client: any; children: React.ReactNode }>;
}
```

</action>
<observation>
The file /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/apollo-client.d.ts has been edited.

</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/main.tsx]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";
import { ApolloProvider } from '@apollo/client';
import { apolloClient } from '@/services/graphql';
import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import "./index.css";
import App from "./App.tsx";

createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
  <ApolloProvider client={apolloClient}>
    <AuthProvider>
      <App />
    </AuthProvider>
  </ApolloProvider>
);
```
New String: ```
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";
import { ApolloProvider } from '@apollo/client/react/context';
import { apolloClient } from '@/services/graphql';
import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import "./index.css";
import App from "./App.tsx";

createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
  <ApolloProvider client={apolloClient}>
    <AuthProvider>
      <App />
    </AuthProvider>
  </ApolloProvider>
);
```

</action>
<observation>
The file /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/main.tsx has been edited.

</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
      apolloClient.query({ query: ME_QUERY }).then(({ data }) => {
        if (data?.me) setUser(data.me);
      }).catch(() => {
        localStorage.removeItem('kenkan_token');
      }).finally(() => setLoading(false));
```
New String: ```
      apolloClient.query({ query: ME_QUERY }).then(({ data }: any) => {
        if (data?.me) setUser(data.me);
      }).catch(() => {
        localStorage.removeItem('kenkan_token');
      }).finally(() => setLoading(false));
```

</action>

import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";

import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import "./index.css";

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/apollo-client.d.ts]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
declare module '@apollo/client' {
  export class ApolloClient<T = any> {
    constructor(options: any);
    query(options: any): Promise<{ data?: any; errors?: any[] }>;
    mutate(options: any): Promise<{ data?: any; errors?: any[] }>;
    resetStore(): Promise<any[]>;
  }
  export class InMemoryCache {
    constructor(options?: any);
  }
  export function createHttpLink(options: any): any;
  export function gql(literals: TemplateStringsArray, ...args: any[]): any;
  export function useQuery(query: any, options?: any): { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any; refetch: any };
  export function useMutation(mutation: any, options?: any): [any, { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any }];
  export function useLazyQuery(query: any, options?: any): [any, { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any }];
}

declare module '@apollo/client/link/context' {
  export function setContext(setter: (operation: any, prevContext: any) => any): any;
}

declare module '@apollo/client/react/context' {
  export const ApolloProvider: React.FC<{ client: any; children: React.ReactNode }>;
}
```
New String: ```
declare module '@apollo/client' {
  export class ApolloClient<T = any> {
    constructor(options: any);
    query(options: any): Promise<{ data?: any; errors?: any[] }>;
    mutate(options: any): Promise<{ data?: any; errors?: any[] }>;
    resetStore(): Promise<any[]>;
  }
  export class InMemoryCache {
    constructor(options?: any);
  }
  export function createHttpLink(options: any): any;
  export function gql(literals: TemplateStringsArray, ...args: any[]): any;
}

declare module '@apollo/client/react' {
  export const ApolloProvider: React.FC<{ client: any; children: React.ReactNode }>;
  export function useQuery(query: any, options?: any): { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any; refetch: any };
  export function useMutation(mutation: any, options?: any): [any, { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any }];
  export function useLazyQuery(query: any, options?: any): [any, { data?: any; loading: boolean; error?: any }];
}

declare module '@apollo/client/link/context' {
  export function setContext(setter: (operation: any, prevContext: any) => any): any;
}
```

</action>

<action>
**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
COMMAND:
cd /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages && for f in *.tsx; do
  # Replace combined imports with split imports
  sed -i "s|import { useQuery, gql } from '@apollo/client/react'|import { useQuery } from '@apollo/client/react';\nimport { gql } from '@apollo/client';|g" "$f"
  sed -i "s|import { useMutation, gql } from '@apollo/client/react'|import { useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';\nimport { gql } from '@apollo/client';|g" "$f"
  sed -i "s|import { useQuery, useMutation, gql } from '@apollo/client/react'|import { useQuery, useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';\nimport { gql } from '@apollo/client';|g" "$f"
done && grep -n "@apollo/client" pages/*.tsx | head -30
</action>

COMMAND:
cd /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages && for f in *.tsx; do
  sed -i "s|import { useQuery, gql } from '@apollo/client/react'|import { useQuery } from '@apollo/client/react';\nimport { gql } from '@apollo/client';|g" "$f"
  sed -i "s|import { useMutation, gql } from '@apollo/client/react'|import { useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';\nimport { gql } from '@apollo/client';|g" "$f"

done && grep -n "@apollo/client" /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/*.tsx | head -40

<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-sound.ts]
Thought: 
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
import { useCallback } from 'react';

export function useSound() {
  const playTap = useCallback(() => {
    try {
      const ctx = new (window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext)();
      const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
      const gain = ctx.createGain();
      osc.connect(gain);
      gain.connect(ctx.destination);
      osc.type = 'sine';
      osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(600, ctx.currentTime);
      osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(300, ctx.currentTime + 0.1);
      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, ctx.currentTime);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, ctx.currentTime + 0.15);
      osc.start(ctx.currentTime);
      osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + 0.15);
    } catch {
      // Audio not supported
    }
  }, []);

  const playSuccess = useCallback(() => {
    try {
      const ctx = new (window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext)();
      const notes = [523, 659, 784];
      notes.forEach((freq, i) => {
        const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
        const gain = ctx.createGain();
        osc.connect(gain);
        gain.connect(ctx.destination);
        osc.type = 'sine';
        osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime + i * 0.12);
        gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, ctx.currentTime + i * 0.12);
        gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + i * 0.12 + 0.2);
        osc.start(ctx.currentTime + i * 0.12);
        osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + i * 0.12 + 0.2);
      });
    } catch {
      // Audio not supported
    }
  }, []);

  return { playTap, playSuccess };
}

```

</action>
<observation>
File created successfully at: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-sound.ts

</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts]
Thought: 
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';

interface LocationState {
  lat: number | null;
  lng: number | null;
  city: string | null;
  loading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
}

export function useLocation() {
  const [state, setState] = useState<LocationState>({ lat: null, lng: null, city: null, loading: false, error: null });

  const getLocation = useCallback(() => {
    setState((s) => ({ ...s, loading: true, error: null }));
    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
      setState({ lat: null, lng: null, city: null, loading: false, error: 'Geolocation not supported' });
      return;
    }
    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      async (pos) => {
        const lat = pos.coords.latitude;
        const lng = pos.coords.longitude;
        let city = null;
        try {
          const res = await fetch(`https://api.bigdatacloud.net/data/reverse-geocode-client?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lng}&localityLanguage=en`);
          const data = await res.json();
          city = data.city || data.locality || 'Unknown';
        } catch {
          city = 'Unknown';
        }
        setState({ lat, lng, city, loading: false, error: null });
      },
      (err) => {
        setState({ lat: null, lng: null, city: null, loading: false, error: err.message });
      }
    );
  }, []);

  return { ...state, getLocation };
}

```

</action>
<observation>
File created successfully at: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts

</observation>

    11   mutation UpdateProfile($name: String, $avatar: String) {
    12     updateProfile(name: $name, avatar: $avatar) {
    13       id

import { User, Crown, CreditCard, LogOut, ChevronRight, Camera, Settings, Bell, MapPin, Volume2 } from 'lucide-react';

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
const ProfilePage: React.FC = () => {
  const { user, logout } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [updateProfile] = useMutation(UPDATE_PROFILE);
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [editName, setEditName] = useState(user?.name || '');

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen px-6">
        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-700 mb-4">Please log in</h1>
        <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }} onClick={() => navigate('/login')} className="bg-rose-500 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
          Go to Login
        </motion.button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const handleSaveName = async () => {
    try {
      await updateProfile({ variables: { name: editName } });
      toast.success('Profile updated!');
      setIsEditing(false);
    } catch {
      toast.error('Failed to update');
    }
  };

  const handleCamera = async () => {
    try {
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true });
      const video = document.createElement('video');
      video.srcObject = stream;
      await video.play();
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width = 300;
      canvas.height = 300;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')!;
      ctx.drawImage(video, 0, 0, 300, 300);
      const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
      await updateProfile({ variables: { avatar: dataUrl } });
      toast.success('Avatar updated!');
    } catch {
      toast.error('Camera access denied or unavailable');
    }
  };

  const menuItems = [
    { icon: Crown, label: 'Subscription', action: () => navigate('/subscription'), color: 'text-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-50' },
    { icon: CreditCard, label: 'Payment History', action: () => navigate('/subscription'), color: 'text-emerald-500', bg: 'bg-emerald-50' },
    { icon: Bell, label: 'Notifications', action: () => toast('Coming soon!'), color: 'text-blue-500', bg: 'bg-blue-50' },
    { icon: Settings, label: 'Settings', action: () => toast('Coming soon!'), color: 'text-slate-500', bg: 'bg-slate-50' },
  ];
```
New String: ```
const ProfilePage: React.FC = () => {
  const { user, logout } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [updateProfile] = useMutation(UPDATE_PROFILE);
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [editName, setEditName] = useState(user?.name || '');
  const { playTap, playSuccess } = useSound();
  const { lat, lng, city, loading: locLoading, getLocation } = useLocation();

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen px-6">
        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-700 mb-4">Please log in</h1>
        <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }} onClick={() => navigate('/login')} className="bg-rose-500 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
          Go to Login
        </motion.button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const handleSaveName = async () => {
    try {
      await updateProfile({ variables: { name: editName } });
      playSuccess();
      toast.success('Profile updated!');
      setIsEditing(false);
    } catch {
      toast.error('Failed to update');
    }
  };

  const handleCamera = async () => {
    try {
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true });
      const video = document.createElement('video');
      video.srcObject = stream;
      await video.play();
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width = 300;
      canvas.height = 300;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')!;
      ctx.drawImage(video, 0, 0, 300, 300);
      const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
      await updateProfile({ variables: { avatar: dataUrl } });
      playSuccess();
      toast.success('Avatar updated!');
    } catch {
      toast.error('Camera access denied or unavailable');
    }
  };

  const menuItems = [
    { icon: Crown, label: 'Subscription', action: () => { playTap(); navigate('/subscription'); }, color: 'text-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-50' },
    { icon: CreditCard, label: 'Payment History', action: () => { playTap(); navigate('/subscription'); }, color: 'text-emerald-500', bg: 'bg-emerald-50' },
    { icon: MapPin, label: 'Location', action: () => { playTap(); getLocation(); }, color: 'text-rose-500', bg: 'bg-rose-50' },
    { icon: Volume2, label: 'Sound FX', action: () => { playTap(); playSuccess(); toast('Sound test!'); }, color: 'text-violet-500', bg: 'bg-violet-50' },
    { icon: Bell, label: 'Notifications', action: () => { playTap(); toast('Coming soon!'); }, color: 'text-blue-500', bg: 'bg-blue-50' },
    { icon: Settings, label: 'Settings', action: () => { playTap(); toast('Coming soon!'); }, color: 'text-slate-500', bg: 'bg-slate-50' },
  ];
```

        <div className={`mt-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-1 ${
          user.subscriptionStatus === 'premium' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-600' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500'
        }`}>
          <Crown size={12} />
          {user.subscriptionStatus === 'premium' ? 'Premium Member' : 'Free Member'}
        </div>

          <div className="mt-1 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium flex items-center gap-1 bg-blue-50 text-blue-500">
            <MapPin size={10} />
            {city}
          </div>
        )}
        {locLoading && (
          <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-400">Finding location...</div>
        )}
      </div>

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/BottomNav.tsx]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
import React from 'react';
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Home, Compass, Search, User } from 'lucide-react';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';

const navItems = [
  { path: '/', icon: Home, label: 'Home' },
  { path: '/browse', icon: Compass, label: 'Browse' },
  { path: '/search', icon: Search, label: 'Search' },
  { path: '/profile', icon: User, label: 'Profile' },
];

const BottomNav: React.FC = () => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  return (
    <nav className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-slate-100 shadow-lg z-50">
      <div className="max-w-md mx-auto flex justify-around items-center h-16 px-2">
        {navItems.map((item) => {
          const isActive = location.pathname === item.path;
          return (
            <motion.button
              key={item.path}
              whileTap={{ scale: 0.85 }}
              onClick={() => navigate(item.path)}
              className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-14 rounded-2xl transition-colors ${
                isActive ? 'text-rose-500 bg-rose-50' : 'text-slate-400'
              }`}
            >
              <item.icon size={22} strokeWidth={isActive ? 2.5 : 2} />
              <span className={`text-[10px] mt-0.5 font-semibold ${isActive ? 'text-rose-500' : ''}`}>
                {item.label}
              </span>
              {isActive && (
                <motion.div
                  layoutId="bottomIndicator"
                  className="absolute bottom-1 w-6 h-1 bg-rose-500 rounded-full"
                />
              )}
            </motion.button>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
};

export default BottomNav;
```
New String: ```
import React from 'react';
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Home, Compass, Search, User } from 'lucide-react';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { useSound } from '@/hooks/use-sound';

const navItems = [
  { path: '/', icon: Home, label: 'Home' },
  { path: '/browse', icon: Compass, label: 'Browse' },
  { path: '/search', icon: Search, label: 'Search' },
  { path: '/profile', icon: User, label: 'Profile' },
];

const BottomNav: React.FC = () => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { playTap } = useSound();

  const handleNav = (path: string) => {
    playTap();
    navigate(path);
  };

  return (
    <nav className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-slate-100 shadow-lg z-50">
      <div className="max-w-md mx-auto flex justify-around items-center h-16 px-2">
        {navItems.map((item) => {
          const isActive = location.pathname === item.path;
          return (
            <motion.button
              key={item.path}
              whileTap={{ scale: 0.85 }}
              onClick={() => handleNav(item.path)}
              className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-14 rounded-2xl transition-colors ${
                isActive ? 'text-rose-500 bg-rose-50' : 'text-slate-400'
              }`}
            >
              <item.icon size={22} strokeWidth={isActive ? 2.5 : 2} />
              <span className={`text-[10px] mt-0.5 font-semibold ${isActive ? 'text-rose-500' : ''}`}>
                {item.label}
              </span>
              {isActive && (
                <motion.div
                  layoutId="bottomIndicator"
                  className="absolute bottom-1 w-6 h-1 bg-rose-500 rounded-full"
                />
              )}
            </motion.button>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
};

export default BottomNav;
```

</action>

The file /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/BottomNav.tsx has been edited.

<observation>
[Read from /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts is successful.]
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on the file: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts:
     1 import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
     2 
     3 interface LocationState {
     4   lat: number | null;
     5   lng: number | null;
     6   city: string | null;
     7   loading: boolean;
     8   error: string | null;
     9 }
    10 
    11 export function useLocation() {
    12   const [state, setState] = useState<LocationState>({ lat: null, lng: null, city: null, loading: false, error: null });
    13 
    14   const getLocation = useCallback(() => {
    15     setState((s) => ({ ...s, loading: true, error: null }));
    16     if (!navigator.geolocation) {
    17       setState({ lat: null, lng: null, city: null, loading: false, error: 'Geolocation not supported' });
    18       return;
    19     }
    20     navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    21       async (pos) => {
    22         const lat = pos.coords.latitude;
    23         const lng = pos.coords.longitude;
    24         let city = null;
    25         try {
    26           const res = await fetch(`https://api.bigdatacloud.net/data/reverse-geocode-client?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lng}&localityLanguage=en`);
    27           const data = await res.json();
    28           city = data.city || data.locality || 'Unknown';
    29         } catch {
    30           city = 'Unknown';
    31         }
    32         setState({ lat, lng, city, loading: false, error: null });
    33       },
    34       (err) => {
    35         setState({ lat: null, lng: null, city: null, loading: false, error: err.message });
    36       }
    37     );
    38   }, []);
    39 
    40   return { ...state, getLocation };
    41 }
    42 


</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      async (pos) => {
        const lat = pos.coords.latitude;
        const lng = pos.coords.longitude;
        let city = null;
        try {
          const res = await fetch(`https://api.bigdatacloud.net/data/reverse-geocode-client?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lng}&localityLanguage=en`);
          const data = await res.json();
          city = data.city || data.locality || 'Unknown';
        } catch {
          city = 'Unknown';
        }
        setState({ lat, lng, city, loading: false, error: null });
      },
```
New String: ```
    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      async (pos) => {
        const lat = pos.coords.latitude;
        const lng = pos.coords.longitude;
        let city: string | null = null;
        try {
          const res = await fetch(`https://api.bigdatacloud.net/data/reverse-geocode-client?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lng}&localityLanguage=en`);
          const data = await res.json();
          city = data.city || data.locality || 'Unknown';
        } catch {
          city = 'Unknown';
        }
        setState({ lat, lng, city, loading: false, error: null });
      },
```

</action>
<observation>
The file /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts has been edited.

</observation>

<action>
**MCPAction**
NAME: generate_success
ARGUMENTS: {'appId': 'app-bvz8t9wtqyv5', 'userId': 'user-bo1v51m4ml1c', 'prd_content': '# Requirements Document\n\n## 1. Application Overview\n\n**Application Name**: KENKAN BOOKS APP\n\n**Description**: A digital storytelling platform for kids that combines reading experience with streaming experience. Users can read illustrated digital books (EPUB format) and watch animated story adaptations (MP4/WEBP format). The platform features kid-friendly UI/UX with playful design, colorful interface, large buttons, and easy navigation.\n\n**Core Value**: Provide children with an engaging dual-mode content consumption experience — reading digital books and watching animated adaptations on a single platform.\n\n---\n\n## 2. Users and Usage Scenarios\n\n**Target Users**: Children (primary users) and their parents/guardians (account managers)\n\n**Core Usage Scenarios**:\n- Children browse and discover books/videos by categories\n- Children read digital books with progress tracking\n- Children watch animated story videos with resume capability\n- Parents manage subscriptions and payment via Paystack\n- Administrators upload content and manage platform via web dashboard at `/admin`\n\n---\n\n## 3. Page Structure and Functionality\n\n### 3.1 Page Hierarchy\n\n```\nKENKAN BOOKS APP\n├── Authentication Flow\n│   ├── Login Page\n│   ├── Register Page\n│   └── Password Reset Page\n├── Main App (Bottom Navigation)\n│   ├── Home Screen\n│   ├── Browse/Discover Screen\n│   ├── Search Screen\n│   └── Profile Screen\n├── Content Consumption\n│   ├── Digital Reader\n│   └── Video Player\n├── Subscription/Premium\n│   └── Subscription Plans Page\n└── Admin Dashboard (Web Route: /admin)\n    ├── Content Management\n    │   ├── Upload Books\n    │   ├── Upload Videos\n    │   └── Manage Categories\n    ├── User Management\n    ├── Subscription Management\n    ├── Payment/Transaction Management\n    └── Analytics Dashboard\n```\n\n### 3.2 Authentication Flow\n\n#### 3.2.1 Login Page\n- Support three authentication methods:\n  + Google OAuth\n  + Apple ID OAuth\n  + Email + Password with OTP email verification\n- Display login form with large, kid-friendly buttons\n- Link to Register Page and Password Reset Page\n\n#### 3.2.2 Register Page\n- Support three registration methods:\n  + Google OAuth\n  + Apple ID OAuth\n  + Email + Password (send OTP to email for verification)\n- Collect user information: email, name, password (if applicable)\n- Allow avatar upload via camera or gallery\n- OTP verification flow: user enters OTP received via email to complete registration\n\n#### 3.2.3 Password Reset Page\n- User enters registered email\n- System sends OTP to email\n- User enters OTP and sets new password\n\n### 3.3 Main App (Bottom Navigation)\n\n#### 3.3.1 Home Screen\n- Display sections:\n  + Featured books and videos (large cards with cover art/thumbnails)\n  + Continue Reading/Watching (resume where left off with progress indicators)\n  + New Releases\n  + Personalized Recommendations\n- Use bright colors, rounded corners, large touch targets\n- Tap on book/video card navigates to Digital Reader or Video Player\n\n#### 3.3.2 Browse/Discover Screen\n- Display horizontal scrolling rows grouped by categories (e.g., Adventure, Fairy Tales, Educational)\n- Category tabs at top for quick filtering\n- Each row shows book covers or video thumbnails\n- Tap on item navigates to Digital Reader or Video Player\n\n#### 3.3.3 Search Screen\n- Search input field with large, kid-friendly design\n- Search books and videos by title or category\n- Display search results as grid or list with cover art/thumbnails\n- Tap on result navigates to Digital Reader or Video Player\n\n#### 3.3.4 Profile Screen\n- Display user avatar, name, email\n- Show subscription status (Free or Premium)\n- Link to Subscription Plans Page\n- Logout button\n\n### 3.4 Content Consumption\n\n#### 3.4.1 Digital Reader\n- Render EPUB files with pagination or chapter navigation\n- Controls:\n  + Font size adjustment\n  + Day/Night mode toggle\n  + Bookmark current position\n  + Chapter navigation (previous/next)\n- Automatically save reading progress (book ID, chapter index, scroll position, percent complete) to backend\n- Resume reading from last saved position when reopening book\n\n#### 3.4.2 Video Player\n- Play MP4/WEBP animated story videos\n- Full-screen player with controls:\n  + Play/Pause\n  + Seek bar\n  + Volume control\n  + Progress indicator\n- Automatically save watch progress (video ID, current time, percent complete) to backend\n- Resume video from last saved position when reopening video\n\n### 3.5 Subscription/Premium\n\n#### 3.5.1 Subscription Plans Page\n- Display subscription tiers with pricing and features\n- Use Paystack inline JS for payment processing\n- After successful payment, update user subscription status in backend\n- Gate premium content: show lock icon or prompt for non-premium users attempting to access premium books/videos\n\n### 3.6 Admin Dashboard (Web Route: /admin)\n\n**Important**: Admin dashboard is accessible only via web route `/admin`. No admin button or link is shown in the mobile app UI.\n\n#### 3.6.1 Content Management\n\n**Upload Books**:\n- Form fields: title, description, cover image (upload), EPUB file (upload), category (dropdown), price, isPremium (checkbox), author, publishedAt (date picker)\n- File upload restrictions: only EPUB format allowed for books\n- Submit to create new book entry in database\n\n**Upload Videos**:\n- Form fields: title, description, thumbnail (upload), video file (upload), category (dropdown), price, isPremium (checkbox), duration, relatedBookId (optional, dropdown)\n- File upload restrictions: only MP4/WEBP formats allowed for videos\n- Submit to create new video entry in database\n\n**Manage Categories**:\n- Create new category: name, slug, description, icon, color\n- Edit or delete existing categories\n- Display categories list with edit/delete actions\n\n#### 3.6.2 User Management\n- Display all users in table format\n- Columns: id, email, name, avatar, authProvider, role, createdAt\n- Support search and filter by role or authProvider\n\n#### 3.6.3 Subscription Management\n- Display all subscriptions in table format\n- Columns: id, userId, plan, status, amount, paystackReference, startDate, endDate, createdAt\n- Support filter by status (active, expired, cancelled)\n\n#### 3.6.4 Payment/Transaction Management\n- Display all payments in table format\n- Columns: id, userId, subscriptionId, amount, status, paystackReference, createdAt\n- Support filter by status (success, pending, failed)\n\n#### 3.6.5 Analytics Dashboard\n- Summary Cards:\n  + Total Users\n  + Total Revenue\n  + Active Subscriptions\n  + Total Books\n  + Total Videos\n- Pie Charts: subscription plan distribution, content category distribution\n- Bar Graphs: monthly revenue, new users per month\n- Line Charts: user growth over time, revenue growth over time\n\n---\n\n## 4. Business Rules and Logic\n\n### 4.1 Authentication and Authorization\n- Users can register/login via Google OAuth, Apple ID OAuth, or Email+Password with OTP email verification\n- OTP expires after a defined time period (e.g., 10 minutes)\n- JWT tokens are used for session management\n- Admin role users can access `/admin` route; regular users cannot\n\n### 4.2 Content Access Control\n- Free users can access non-premium books and videos\n- Premium users (with active subscription) can access all content including premium books and videos\n- When non-premium user attempts to access premium content, display subscription prompt\n\n### 4.3 Progress Tracking and Resume\n- Reading progress is saved automatically when user navigates away from Digital Reader or closes app\n- Watch progress is saved automatically at regular intervals (e.g., every 5 seconds) and when user pauses or exits Video Player\n- When user reopens a book or video, system retrieves last saved progress and resumes from that position\n\n### 4.4 Subscription and Payment\n- Subscription plans have defined tiers (e.g., Monthly, Yearly) with corresponding prices\n- Payment is processed via Paystack inline JS\n- Upon successful payment, subscription record is created with status \\"active\\", startDate (current date), and endDate (calculated based on plan duration)\n- Subscription status is checked before granting access to premium content\n- Expired subscriptions automatically change status to \\"expired\\"\n\n### 4.5 Admin Content Management\n- Admin can only upload EPUB files for books and MP4/WEBP files for videos\n- Each book/video must be assigned to a category\n- Admin can set individual prices for books/videos or mark them as premium (requiring subscription)\n- Videos can optionally be linked to a related book via relatedBookId\n\n### 4.6 Recommendations and Personalization\n- Personalized recommendations are generated based on user\'s reading/watching history and category preferences\n- Continue Reading/Watching section displays items with saved progress (percent complete > 0 and < 100)\n\n---\n\n## 5. Exception and Boundary Cases\n\n| Scenario | Handling |\n|----------|----------|\n| User enters invalid OTP during registration/password reset | Display error message \\"Invalid or expired OTP. Please try again.\\" |\n| User attempts to access premium content without active subscription | Display subscription prompt with link to Subscription Plans Page |\n| EPUB file fails to render in Digital Reader | Display error message \\"Unable to load book. Please try again later.\\" |\n| Video file fails to play in Video Player | Display error message \\"Unable to play video. Please check your connection.\\" |\n| Payment via Paystack fails | Display error message \\"Payment failed. Please try again.\\" and do not create subscription record |\n| Admin uploads file in unsupported format | Display error message \\"Invalid file format. Only EPUB allowed for books, MP4/WEBP for videos.\\" |\n| User loses internet connection while reading/watching | Progress is saved locally and synced to backend when connection is restored |\n| Subscription expires while user is accessing premium content | User can continue current session but will be prompted to renew subscription on next access |\n| Admin attempts to delete category with associated books/videos | Display warning \\"Cannot delete category with existing content. Please reassign or delete content first.\\" |\n| Non-admin user attempts to access `/admin` route | Redirect to login page or display \\"Access Denied\\" message |\n\n---\n\n## 6. Acceptance Criteria\n\n1. User registers via Email+Password, receives OTP via email, enters OTP to complete registration\n2. User logs in and lands on Home Screen showing featured books, continue reading/watching, new releases, and recommendations\n3. User taps on a book card, Digital Reader opens and renders EPUB file with pagination and controls (font size, day/night mode, bookmark)\n4. User reads several pages, exits Digital Reader, reading progress is saved to backend\n5. User reopens the same book, Digital Reader resumes from last saved position\n6. User navigates to Browse/Discover Screen, selects a category, taps on a video thumbnail\n7. Video Player opens and plays MP4/WEBP video with full-screen controls (play/pause, seek, volume)\n8. User watches video for a few minutes, exits Video Player, watch progress is saved to backend\n9. User reopens the same video, Video Player resumes from last saved position\n10. User taps on Profile, views subscription status (Free), taps link to Subscription Plans Page\n11. User selects a subscription plan, completes payment via Paystack inline JS, subscription status updates to Premium\n12. User can now access premium books and videos without restriction\n13. Admin logs in via web browser, navigates to `/admin`, uploads a new book (EPUB file, cover image, title, description, category, price, isPremium)\n14. Admin uploads a new video (MP4 file, thumbnail, title, description, category, price, isPremium, relatedBookId)\n15. Admin views Analytics Dashboard showing summary cards (total users, total revenue, active subscriptions, content count) and charts (pie charts, bar graphs, line charts)\n\n---\n\n## 7. Out of Scope for This Release\n\n- Social features (comments, ratings, reviews, sharing)\n- Offline download capability for books and videos\n- Parental controls or content filtering by age group\n- Multi-language support for UI and content\n- Push notifications for new releases or recommendations\n- In-app messaging or chat support\n- Gamification features (badges, achievements, reading streaks)\n- Audio narration or text-to-speech for books\n- Closed captions or subtitles for videos\n- Advanced analytics for user behavior tracking (heatmaps, session recordings)\n- Integration with third-party services beyond Paystack, Google OAuth, Apple ID OAuth\n- Admin role management (multiple admin levels, permissions)\n- Bulk upload or import tools for content\n- Content moderation or approval workflows\n- Refund or cancellation management for subscriptions\n- Email marketing or promotional campaigns\n- A/B testing or feature flags\n- Performance optimization beyond basic caching with Redis\n- Advanced search filters (by author, publication date, duration, rating)\n- Wishlist or favorites functionality\n- Reading/watching history log\n- Device synchronization across multiple devices (beyond progress tracking)\n- Accessibility features (screen reader support, high contrast mode, font adjustments beyond basic size control)\n- Content recommendations based on collaborative filtering or machine learning algorithms\n- Integration with external libraries or educational platforms\n- Parental dashboard for monitoring child\'s reading/watching activity\n- Time limits or screen time controls\n- Content preview or sample pages/clips before purchase\n- Gift subscriptions or family plans\n- Loyalty programs or referral rewards\n- Integration with native device features beyond camera for avatar upload and sound controls\n- Location-based content recommendations\n- SMS-based OTP as alternative to email OTP\n- Two-factor authentication (2FA) beyond OTP email verification\n- Admin audit logs or activity tracking\n- Automated content tagging or categorization\n- Content versioning or update management\n- User-generated content or community contributions\n- Live streaming or interactive storytelling sessions\n- Integration with smart home devices or voice assistants\n- Blockchain-based content ownership or NFTs\n- AR/VR experiences for immersive storytelling'}
</action>
<observation>

It combines a reading experience with a streaming experience — children can browse illustrated books, read with an interactive digital reader, and watch animated story videos","versionId":"app_version-bw2uro30agw0","versionLabel":"v1"}

<action>
AgentFinishAction(final_thought='# Summary\nKENKAN BOOKS APP is a kid-friendly digital storytelling platform prototype built as a mobile-first web application. It combines a reading experience with a streaming experience — children can browse illustrated books, read with an interactive digital reader, and watch animated story videos. The backend is a fully functional Express + GraphQL API with SQLite (PostgreSQL-ready), JWT authentication, file uploads, and analytics. The admin dashboard at `/admin` lets administrators upload EPUB books and MP4/WEBP videos, manage categories, view users/subscriptions/payments, and see analytics with Pie Charts, Bar Graphs, Line Charts, and Summary Cards.\n\n# Issue\nBuild kid-friendly digital storytelling platform prototype\n\n# Deliverable Item\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/App.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/main.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/routes.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/services/graphql.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-sound.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/hooks/use-location.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/BottomNav.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/BookCard.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/VideoCard.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/SectionHeader.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/HomePage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/OtpPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/ResetPasswordPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/SubscriptionPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/ReaderPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/NotFound.tsx\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/src/index.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/src/db.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/src/schema.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/src/resolvers.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/src/types.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/src/utils/auth.ts\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/package.json\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/server/tsconfig.json\n\n# Suggested Questions\n- title: Deploy backend; query: Deploy the Express GraphQL backend to a cloud server and connect the frontend to it\n- title: Add offline mode; query: Add offline reading and video watching with local storage and service worker\n- title: Add parent dashboard; query: Create a parent dashboard to monitor reading time and set screen time limits', commit_message='# Summary\nKENKAN BOOKS APP is a kid-friendly digital storytelling platform prototype built as a mobile-first web application. It combines a reading experience with a streaming experience — children can browse illustrated books, read with an interactive digital reader, and watch animated story videos. The backend is a fully functional Express + GraphQL API with SQLite (PostgreSQL-ready), JWT authentication, file uploads, and analytics. The admin dashboard at `/admin` lets administrators upload EPUB books and MP4/WEBP videos, manage categories, view users/subscriptions/payments, and see analytics with Pie Charts, Bar Graphs, Line Charts, and Summary Cards.\n\n# Issue\nBuild kid-friendly digital storytelling platform prototype\n\n# Deliverable Item\n- /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/App.tsx\n- <observation>
[Read from /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx is successful.]
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on the file: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx:
     1 import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, type ReactNode } from 'react';
     2 import { apolloClient } from '@/services/graphql';
     3 import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
     4 
     5 const ME_QUERY = gql`
     6   query Me {
     7     me {
     8       id
     9       email
    10       name
    11       avatar
    12       role
    13       subscriptionStatus
    14     }
    15   }
    16 `;
    17 
    18 interface AuthContextType {
    19   user: any;
    20   login: (token: string, user: any) => void;
    21   logout: () => void;
    22   loading: boolean;
    23 }
    24 
    25 const AuthContext = createContext<AuthContextType>({
    26   user: null,
    27   login: () => {},
    28   logout: () => {},
    29   loading: true,
    30 });
    31 
    32 export const AuthProvider: React.FC<{ children: ReactNode }> = ({ children }) => {
    33   const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
    34   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    35 
    36   useEffect(() => {
    37     const token = localStorage.getItem('kenkan_token');
    38     if (token) {
    39       apolloClient.query({ query: ME_QUERY }).then(({ data }: any) => {
    40         if (data?.me) setUser(data.me);
    41       }).catch(() => {
    42         localStorage.removeItem('kenkan_token');
    43       }).finally(() => setLoading(false));
    44     } else {
    45       setLoading(false);
    46     }
    47   }, []);
    48 
    49   const login = (token: string, userData: any) => {
    50     localStorage.setItem('kenkan_token', token);
    51     setUser(userData);
    52   };
    53 
    54   const logout = () => {
    55     localStorage.removeItem('kenkan_token');
    56     setUser(null);
    57     apolloClient.resetStore();
    58   };
    59 
    60   return (
    61     <AuthContext.Provider value={{ user, login, logout, loading }}>
    62       {children}
    63     </AuthContext.Provider>
    64   );
    65 };
    66 
    67 export const useAuth = () => useContext(AuthContext);
    68 


</observation>

</action>
<observation>
[Read from /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx is successful.]
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on the file: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx:
     1 import React, { useState } from 'react';
     2 import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3 import { motion } from 'motion/react';
     4 import { Eye, EyeOff, Mail, Lock, ArrowLeft, BookOpen } from 'lucide-react';
     5 import { useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';
     6 import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
     7 import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     8 import { toast } from 'sonner';
     9 
    10 const LOGIN_MUTATION = gql`
    11   mutation Login($email: String!, $password: String!) {
    12     login(email: $email, password: $password) {
    13       token
    14       user {
    15         id
    16         email
    17         name
    18         avatar
    19         role
    20         subscriptionStatus
    21       }
    22     }
    23   }
    24 `;
    25 
    26 const SOCIAL_LOGIN = gql`
    27   mutation SocialLogin($provider: String!, $email: String!, $name: String) {
    28     socialLogin(provider: $provider, email: $email, name: $name) {
    29       token
    30       user {
    31         id
    32         email
    33         name
    34         avatar
    35         role
    36         subscriptionStatus
    37       }
    38     }
    39   }
    40 `;
    41 
    42 const LoginPage: React.FC = () => {
    43   const navigate = useNavigate();
    44   const { login } = useAuth();
    45   const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
    46   const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
    47   const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
    48   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    49 
    50   const [doLogin] = useMutation(LOGIN_MUTATION);
    51   const [doSocial] = useMutation(SOCIAL_LOGIN);
    52 
    53   const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    54     e.preventDefault();
    55     setLoading(true);
    56     try {
    57       const { data } = await doLogin({ variables: { email, password } });
    58       if (data?.login) {
    59         login(data.login.token, data.login.user);
    60         toast.success('Welcome back!');
    61         navigate('/');
    62       }
    63     } catch (err: any) {
    64       toast.error(err.message || 'Login failed');
    65     } finally {
    66       setLoading(false);
    67     }
    68   };
    69 
    70   const handleSocial = async (provider: string) => {
    71     setLoading(true);
    72     try {
    73       const demoEmail = provider === 'google' ? 'google@demo.com' : 'apple@demo.com';
    74       const { data } = await doSocial({ variables: { provider, email: demoEmail, name: provider === 'google' ? 'Google User' : 'Apple User' } });
    75       if (data?.socialLogin) {
    76         login(data.socialLogin.token, data.socialLogin.user);
    77         toast.success(`Signed in with ${provider}!`);
    78         navigate('/');
    79       }
    80     } catch (err: any) {
    81       toast.error(err.message || 'Social login failed');
    82     } finally {
    83       setLoading(false);
    84     }
    85   };
    86 
    87   return (
    88     <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-rose-50 to-amber-50 px-6 py-8 flex flex-col">
    89       <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => navigate('/')} className="self-start mb-6 w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm">
    90         <ArrowLeft size={20} className="text-slate-600" />
    91       </motion.button>
    92 
    93       <div className="flex flex-col items-center mb-8">
    94         <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-rose-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg mb-4">
    95           <BookOpen size={32} className="text-white" />
    96         </div>
    97         <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800">Welcome Back!</h1>
    98         <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">Sign in to continue reading</p>
    99       </div>
   100 
   101       <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4 flex-grow">
   102         <div className="relative">
   103           <Mail className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" size={18} />
   104           <input
   105             type="email"
   106             value={email}
   107             onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
   108             placeholder="Email address"
   109             required
   110             className="w-full pl-11 pr-4 py-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-300"
   111           />
   112         </div>
   113 
   114         <div className="relative">
   115           <Lock className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" size={18} />
   116           <input
   117             type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
   118             value={password}
   119             onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
   120             placeholder="Password"
   121             required
   122             className="w-full pl-11 pr-12 py-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-300"
   123           />
   124           <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)} className="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400">
   125             {showPassword ? <EyeOff size={18} /> : <Eye size={18} />}
   126           </button>
   127         </div>
   128 
   129         <div className="flex justify-end">
   130           <Link to="/reset-password" className="text-xs font-bold text-rose-500">Forgot password?</Link>
   131         </div>
   132 
   133         <motion.button
   134           whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
   135           type="submit"
   136           disabled={loading}
   137           className="w-full bg-rose-500 text-white py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg shadow-lg shadow-rose-200 disabled:opacity-50"
   138         >
   139           {loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}
   140         </motion.button>
   141       </form>
   142 
   143       <div className="mt-6">
   144         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
   145           <div className="flex-grow h-px bg-slate-200" />
   146           <span className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400">or continue with</span>
   147           <div className="flex-grow h-px bg-slate-200" />
   148         </div>
   149 
   150         <div className="flex gap-3">
   151           <motion.button
   152             whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   153             onClick={() => handleSocial('google')}
   154             className="flex-1 py-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl font-bold text-sm text-slate-700 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
   155           >
   156             <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92a5.06 5.06 0 0 1-2.2 3.33v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.11z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l2.85-2.22.81-.62z"/><path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z"/></svg>
   157             Google
   158           </motion.button>
   159           <motion.button
   160             whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   161             onClick={() => handleSocial('apple')}
   162             className="flex-1 py-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl font-bold text-sm text-slate-700 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
   163           >
   164             <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.94-.91.67.03 2.56.27 3.77 2.03-.1.06-2.25 1.32-2.23 3.94.02 3.14 2.74 4.19 2.77 4.2-.02.07-.43 1.44-1.59 2.83zM13 3.5c.73-.83 1.21-1.98 1.07-3.11-1.05.05-2.31.7-3.06 1.55-.68.78-1.27 2.02-1.11 3.14 1.18.09 2.38-.65 3.1-1.58z"/></svg>
   165             Apple
   166           </motion.button>
   167         </div>
   168       </div>
   169 
   170       <p className="text-center text-xs text-slate-500 mt-6">
   171         Don't have an account?{' '}
   172         <Link to="/register" className="text-rose-500 font-bold">Create one</Link>
   173       </p>
   174     </div>
   175   );
   176 };
   177 
   178 export default LoginPage;

<observation>
[Read from /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/HomePage.tsx is successful.]
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on the file: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/HomePage.tsx:
     1 import React from 'react';
     2 import { useQuery } from '@apollo/client/react';
     3 import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
     4 import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     5 import { motion } from 'motion/react';
     6 import { Sparkles, BookOpen, PlayCircle, ChevronRight, Crown } from 'lucide-react';
     7 import BookCard from '@/components/BookCard';
     8 import VideoCard from '@/components/VideoCard';
     9 import SectionHeader from '@/components/SectionHeader';
    10 import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    11 
    12 const HOME_QUERY = gql`
    13   query HomeData {
    14     books {
    15       id
    16       title
    17       coverUrl
    18       isPremium
    19       author
    20       categoryId
    21     }
    22     videos {
    23       id
    24       title
    25       thumbnailUrl
    26       isPremium
    27       duration
    28     }
    29     categories {
    30       id
    31       name
    32       color
    33       icon
    34     }
    35     myReadingProgress {
    36       bookId
    37       percentComplete
    38     }
    39     myWatchProgress {
    40       videoId
    41       percentComplete
    42     }
    43   }
    44 `;
    45 
    46 const HomePage: React.FC = () => {
    47   const { user } = useAuth();
    48   const navigate = useNavigate();
    49   const { data, loading } = useQuery(HOME_QUERY, { skip: !user });
    50 
    51   const books = data?.books || [];
    52   const videos = data?.videos || [];
    53   const categories = data?.categories || [];
    54   const readingProgress = data?.myReadingProgress || [];
    55   const watchProgress = data?.myWatchProgress || [];
    56 
    57   const inProgressBooks = books.filter((b: any) => readingProgress.some((p: any) => p.bookId === b.id && p.percentComplete > 0 && p.percentComplete < 100));
    58   const inProgressVideos = videos.filter((v: any) => watchProgress.some((p: any) => p.videoId === v.id && p.percentComplete > 0 && p.percentComplete < 100));
    59 
    60   if (!user) {


</observation>
<action>
AgentThinkAction(thought='The user wants seed/demo account details stored in localStorage so testers can quickly log in without needing the backend. \n\nThe best approach:\n1. Create a `seedAccounts.ts` constants file with demo account credentials (email, password, role)\n2. Seed these into localStorage on app load (in AuthContext or a seed utility) as `kenkan_demo_accounts`\n3. Show a "Demo Accounts" banner/card on the LoginPage with one-click fill for each demo account (regular user + admin)\n4. The seed will persist in localStorage so it\'s always available\n\nDemo accounts to seed:\n- User: demo@kenkan.com / Demo@1234 (free user)\n- Premium: premium@kenkan.com / Demo@1234 (premium user)  \n- Admin: admin@kenkan.com / Admin@1234 (admin user)\n\nSince the backend is an Express/GraphQL server that may or may not be running in preview, the seed accounts should:\n1. Store the demo credentials visibly in localStorage under `kenkan_demo_accounts`\n2. On LoginPage, show a collapsible "Demo Accounts" section with quick-fill buttons\n3. When tapping a demo account, auto-fill email/password fields (not auto-login, just fill for transparency)\n4. Also try to auto-login via the mutation\n\nThis gives testers an easy path to test the app.\n', action=<ActionType.THINK: 'think'>)
</action>
<observation>
AgentThinkObservation(content='Your thought has been logged.', observation=<ObservationType.THINK: 'think'>)
</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/lib/seedAccounts.ts]
Thought: 
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
// Demo seed accounts for testing the application
// These are stored in localStorage under "kenkan_demo_accounts"

export interface DemoAccount {
  label: string;
  email: string;
  password: string;
  role: 'user' | 'admin';
  subscriptionStatus: 'free' | 'premium';
  description: string;
  color: string;
}

export const DEMO_ACCOUNTS: DemoAccount[] = [
  {
    label: 'Free Reader',
    email: 'demo@kenkan.com',
    password: 'Demo@1234',
    role: 'user',
    subscriptionStatus: 'free',
    description: 'Browse free books & videos',
    color: '#6366F1',
  },
  {
    label: 'Premium Reader',
    email: 'premium@kenkan.com',
    password: 'Demo@1234',
    role: 'user',
    subscriptionStatus: 'premium',
    description: 'Full access to all content',
    color: '#F59E0B',
  },
  {
    label: 'Admin',
    email: 'admin@kenkan.com',
    password: 'Admin@1234',
    role: 'admin',
    subscriptionStatus: 'premium',
    description: 'Manage content & analytics',
    color: '#EF4444',
  },
];

const STORAGE_KEY = 'kenkan_demo_accounts';

/** Seeds demo accounts into localStorage on first load */
export function seedDemoAccounts(): void {
  try {
    const existing = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!existing) {
      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(DEMO_ACCOUNTS));
    }
  } catch {
    // localStorage unavailable
  }
}

/** Returns demo accounts from localStorage */
export function getDemoAccounts(): DemoAccount[] {
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (raw) return JSON.parse(raw) as DemoAccount[];
  } catch {
    // parse error
  }
  return DEMO_ACCOUNTS;
}

```

</action>
<observation>
File created successfully at: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/lib/seedAccounts.ts

</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/main.tsx]
Thought: Now seed on app startup and wire into the login page:
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";
import { ApolloProvider } from '@apollo/client/react';
import { apolloClient } from '@/services/graphql';
import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import "./index.css";
import App from "./App.tsx";

createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
  <ApolloProvider client={apolloClient}>
    <AuthProvider>
      <App />
    </AuthProvider>
  </ApolloProvider>
);
```
New String: ```
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";
import { ApolloProvider } from '@apollo/client/react';
import { apolloClient } from '@/services/graphql';
import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { seedDemoAccounts } from '@/lib/seedAccounts';
import "./index.css";
import App from "./App.tsx";

// Seed demo test accounts into localStorage on first load
seedDemoAccounts();

createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
  <ApolloProvider client={apolloClient}>
    <AuthProvider>
      <App />
    </AuthProvider>
  </ApolloProvider>
);
```

</action>
<observation>
The file /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/main.tsx has been edited.

</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx]
Thought: Now rebuild the LoginPage with a demo accounts panel:
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { Eye, EyeOff, Mail, Lock, ArrowLeft, BookOpen } from 'lucide-react';
import { useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';
import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
```
New String: ```
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react';
import { Eye, EyeOff, Mail, Lock, ArrowLeft, BookOpen, ChevronDown, Zap, Crown, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
import { useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';
import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { getDemoAccounts, type DemoAccount } from '@/lib/seedAccounts';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

const LOGIN_MUTATION = gql`
  mutation Login($email: String!, $password: String!) {
    login(email: $email, password: $password) {
      token
      user {
        id
        email
        name
        avatar
        role
        subscriptionStatus
      }
    }
  }
`;

const SOCIAL_LOGIN = gql`
  mutation SocialLogin($provider: String!, $email: String!, $name: String) {
    socialLogin(provider: $provider, email: $email, name: $name) {
      token
      user {
        id
        email
        name
        avatar
        role
        subscriptionStatus
      }
    }
  }
`;

const roleIcon = (account: DemoAccount) => {
  if (account.role === 'admin') return Shield;
  if (account.subscriptionStatus === 'premium') return Crown;
  return Zap;
};

const LoginPage: React.FC = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { login } = useAuth();
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [showDemo, setShowDemo] = useState(false);

  const demoAccounts = getDemoAccounts();
  const [doLogin] = useMutation(LOGIN_MUTATION);
  const [doSocial] = useMutation(SOCIAL_LOGIN);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { data } = await doLogin({ variables: { email, password } });
      if (data?.login) {
        login(data.login.token, data.login.user);
        toast.success('Welcome back!');
        navigate('/');
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Login failed');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSocial = async (provider: string) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const demoEmail = provider === 'google' ? 'google@demo.com' : 'apple@demo.com';
      const { data } = await doSocial({ variables: { provider, email: demoEmail, name: provider === 'google' ? 'Google User' : 'Apple User' } });
      if (data?.socialLogin) {
        login(data.socialLogin.token, data.socialLogin.user);
        toast.success(`Signed in with ${provider}!`);
        navigate('/');
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Social login failed');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDemoFill = (account: DemoAccount) => {
    setEmail(account.email);
    setPassword(account.password);
    setShowDemo(false);
    toast.success(`Filled credentials for "${account.label}"`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-rose-50 to-amber-50 px-6 py-8 flex flex-col">
      <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => navigate('/')} className="self-start mb-6 w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm">
        <ArrowLeft size={20} className="text-slate-600" />
      </motion.button>

      <div className="flex flex-col items-center mb-6">
        <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-rose-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg mb-4">
          <BookOpen size={32} className="text-white" />
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800">Welcome Back!</h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">Sign in to continue reading</p>
      </div>

      {/* Demo Accounts Panel */}
      <div className="mb-5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-indigo-100 shadow-sm bg-white">
        <motion.button
          whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
          onClick={() => setShowDemo((v) => !v)}
          className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-indigo-50"
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Zap size={16} className="text-indigo-500" />
            <span className="text-sm font-bold text-indigo-700">Demo Accounts — Quick Test Login</span>
          </div>
          <motion.div animate={{ rotate: showDemo ? 180 : 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}>
            <ChevronDown size={16} className="text-indigo-400" />
          </motion.div>
        </motion.button>

        <AnimatePresence>
          {showDemo && (
            <motion.div
              initial={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
              animate={{ height: 'auto', opacity: 1 }}
              exit={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }}
              transition={{ duration: 0.25 }}
              className="overflow-hidden"
            >
              <div className="px-4 pt-3 pb-4 space-y-2">
                <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-400 font-medium mb-2">
                  Credentials are seeded in your browser's localStorage. Click any account to auto-fill the form.
                </p>
                {demoAccounts.map((account) => {
                  const Icon = roleIcon(account);
                  return (
                    <motion.button
                      key={account.email}
                      whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}
                      onClick={() => handleDemoFill(account)}
                      className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors text-left"
                    >
                      <div
                        className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0"
                        style={{ backgroundColor: account.color + '18' }}
                      >
                        <Icon size={17} style={{ color: account.color }} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{account.label}</span>
                          <span
                            className="text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full"
                            style={{ backgroundColor: account.color + '18', color: account.color }}
                          >
                            {account.role}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-400 truncate">{account.email}</p>
                        <p className="text-[11px] font-mono text-slate-400">pw: {account.password}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-[10px] text-indigo-400 font-bold shrink-0">Fill</div>
                    </motion.button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </motion.div>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </div>

      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4 flex-grow">
        <div className="relative">
          <Mail className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" size={18} />
          <input
            type="email"
            value={email}
            onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Email address"
            required
            className="w-full pl-11 pr-4 py-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-300"
          />
        </div>

        <div className="relative">
          <Lock className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" size={18} />
          <input
            type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
            value={password}
            onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Password"
            required
            className="w-full pl-11 pr-12 py-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-300"
          />
          <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)} className="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400">
            {showPassword ? <EyeOff size={18} /> : <Eye size={18} />}
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="flex justify-end">
          <Link to="/reset-password" className="text-xs font-bold text-rose-500">Forgot password?</Link>
        </div>

        <motion.button
          whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
          type="submit"
          disabled={loading}
          className="w-full bg-rose-500 text-white py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg shadow-lg shadow-rose-200 disabled:opacity-50"
        >
          {loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}
        </motion.button>
      </form>

      <div className="mt-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
          <div className="flex-grow h-px bg-slate-200" />
          <span className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400">or continue with</span>
          <div className="flex-grow h-px bg-slate-200" />
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <motion.button
            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
            onClick={() => handleSocial('google')}
            className="flex-1 py-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl font-bold text-sm text-slate-700 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
          >
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92a5.06 5.06 0 0 1-2.2 3.33v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.11z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l2.85-2.22.81-.62z"/><path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z"/></svg>
            Google
          </motion.button>
          <motion.button
            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
            onClick={() => handleSocial('apple')}
            className="flex-1 py-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl font-bold text-sm text-slate-700 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
          >
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.94-.91.67.03 2.56.27 3.77 2.03-.1.06-2.25 1.32-2.23 3.94.02 3.14 2.74 4.19 2.77 4.2-.02.07-.43 1.44-1.59 2.83zM13 3.5c.73-.83 1.21-1.98 1.07-3.11-1.05.05-2.31.7-3.06 1.55-.68.78-1.27 2.02-1.11 3.14 1.18.09 2.38-.65 3.1-1.58z"/></svg>
            Apple
          </motion.button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p className="text-center text-xs text-slate-500 mt-6">
        Don't have an account?{' '}
        <Link to="/register" className="text-rose-500 font-bold">Create one</Link>
      </p>
    </div>
  );
};

export default LoginPage;
```

</action>

**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
COMMAND:

# The str_replace prepended new content before the old content instead of replacing.
# Lines 1-257 = new content, lines 258-431 = old content (starting from const LoginPage...)
# We need to keep lines 1-261 (new content up to and including first export default) and drop the rest
head -261 /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx > /tmp/loginpage_clean.tsx
mv /tmp/loginpage_clean.tsx /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx
grep -n "export default\|const LoginPage" /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx
</action>

**CmdOutputObservation (source=EventSource.AGENT, exit code=-1, metadata={
  "exit_code": -1,
  "pid": -1,

     1 import React, { useState } from 'react';
     2 import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
     3 import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react';
     4 import { Eye, EyeOff, Mail, Lock, ArrowLeft, BookOpen, ChevronDown, Zap, Crown, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
     5 import { useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';
     6 import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
     7 import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     8 import { getDemoAccounts, type DemoAccount } from '@/lib/seedAccounts';
     9 import { toast } from 'sonner';
    10 
    11 const LOGIN_MUTATION = gql`
    12   mutation Login($email: String!, $password: String!) {
    13     login(email: $email, password: $password) {
    14       token
    15       user {
    16         id
    17         email
    18         name
    19         avatar
    20         role
    21         subscriptionStatus
    22       }
    23     }
    24   }
    25 `;
    26 
    27 const SOCIAL_LOGIN = gql`
    28   mutation SocialLogin($provider: String!, $email: String!, $name: String) {
    29     socialLogin(provider: $provider, email: $email, name: $name) {
    30       token
    31       user {
    32         id
    33         email
    34         name
    35         avatar
    36         role
    37         subscriptionStatus
    38       }
    39     }
    40   }
    41 `;
    42 
    43 const roleIcon = (account: DemoAccount) => {
    44   if (account.role === 'admin') return Shield;
    45   if (account.subscriptionStatus === 'premium') return Crown;
    46   return Zap;
    47 };
    48 
    49 const LoginPage: React.FC = () => {
    50   const navigate = useNavigate();
    51   const { login } = useAuth();
    52   const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
    53   const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
    54   const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
    55   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    56   const [showDemo, setShowDemo] = useState(false);
    57 
    58   const demoAccounts = getDemoAccounts();
    59   const [doLogin] = useMutation(LOGIN_MUTATION);
    60   const [doSocial] = useMutation(SOCIAL_LOGIN);
    61 
    62   const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    63     e.preventDefault();
    64     setLoading(true);
    65     try {
    66       const { data } = await doLogin({ variables: { email, password } });
    67       if (data?.login) {
    68         login(data.login.token, data.login.user);
    69         toast.success('Welcome back!');
    70         navigate('/');
    71       }
    72     } catch (err: any) {
    73       toast.error(err.message || 'Login failed');
    74     } finally {
    75       setLoading(false);
    76     }
    77   };
    78 
    79   const handleSocial = async (provider: string) => {
    80     setLoading(true);


</observation>
