--BEGIN AGENT OBSERVATION--
     1	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
     2	import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     3	import { useQuery, useMutation } from '@apollo/client/react';
     4	import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
     5	import { motion } from 'motion/react';
     6	import { ArrowLeft, Sun, Moon, Type, Bookmark, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
     7	import { toast } from 'sonner';
     8	
     9	const BOOK_QUERY = gql`
    10	  query Book($id: ID!) {
    11	    book(id: $id) {
    12	      id
    13	      title
    14	      description
    15	      coverUrl
    16	      epubUrl
    17	      author
    18	    }
    19	    readingProgress(bookId: $id) {
    20	      chapterIndex
    21	      scrollPosition
    22	      percentComplete
    23	    }
    24	  }
    25	`;
    26	
    27	const SAVE_PROGRESS = gql`
    28	  mutation SaveReadingProgress($input: ProgressInput!) {
    29	    saveReadingProgress(input: $input) {
    30	      id
    31	      percentComplete
    32	    }
    33	  }
    34	`;
    35	
    36	const demoChapters = [
    37	  { title: 'Chapter 1: The Beginning', content: 'Once upon a time, in a land far, far away, there lived a brave young hero named Leo. The sun shone brightly over the golden meadows, and birds sang melodies that filled the air with joy. Leo loved to explore the enchanted forest near his home, where every tree had a story to tell and every flower whispered secrets of magic. One sunny morning, as Leo wandered deeper into the woods than ever before, he stumbled upon a glowing path that seemed to shimmer with stardust...' },
    38	  { title: 'Chapter 2: The Magic Forest', content: 'The trees grew taller and the air felt cooler as Leo stepped onto the glowing path. Fireflies danced around him like tiny lanterns, lighting his way through the thick canopy of emerald leaves. Suddenly, a friendly fox with silver fur appeared from behind a mushroom house. "Welcome, traveler," said the fox with a warm smile. "I am Finn, the guardian of the Magic Forest. I have been waiting for someone brave enough to follow the stardust path." Leo felt a surge of excitement and wonder...' },
    39	  { title: 'Chapter 3: The First Challenge', content: 'Finn led Leo to a crystal-clear lake where the water reflected the stars even during the day. "Your first challenge," explained Finn, "is to find the courage to cross the Whispering Bridge. It is said that only those with pure hearts can hear its song and safely reach the other side." Leo approached the bridge made of ancient wood and silver vines. As he placed his first step, the bridge began to hum a melody so beautiful that tears filled his eyes...' },
    40	  { title: 'Chapter 4: New Friends', content: 'On the other side of the bridge, Leo discovered a village of tiny creatures called Lumlings. They were no bigger than acorns, with wings like dragonflies and hearts full of kindness. The Lumlings celebrated Leo\'s arrival with a feast of honey cakes and starlight juice. Their leader, a wise Lumling named Twinkle, presented Leo with a glowing pendant. "This will guide you through the darkest nights and remind you that courage lives within your heart," she said with a gentle voice...' },
    41	];
    42	
    43	const ReaderPage: React.FC = () => {
    44	  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
    45	  const navigate = useNavigate();
    46	  const { data, loading } = useQuery(BOOK_QUERY, { variables: { id } });
    47	  const [saveProgress] = useMutation(SAVE_PROGRESS);
    48	
    49	  const [chapter, setChapter] = useState(0);
    50	  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false);
    51	  const [fontSize, setFontSize] = useState(16);
    52	  const [showControls, setShowControls] = useState(true);
    53	  const [bookmarked, setBookmarked] = useState(false);
    54	  const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    55	
    56	  useEffect(() => {
    57	    if (data?.readingProgress) {
    58	      setChapter(data.readingProgress.chapterIndex || 0);
    59	    }
    60	  }, [data]);
    61	
    62	  useEffect(() => {
    63	    const timer = setTimeout(() => setShowControls(false), 3000);
    64	    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    65	  }, [showControls]);
    66	
    67	  const handleSave = async () => {
    68	    try {
    69	      await saveProgress({ variables: { input: { bookId: id, chapterIndex: chapter, scrollPosition: 0, percentComplete: ((chapter + 1) / demoChapters.length) * 100 } } });
    70	      toast.success('Progress saved!');
    71	    } catch {
    72	      toast.error('Failed to save progress');
    73	    }
    74	  };
    75	
    76	  const book = data?.book;
    77	  const currentChapter = demoChapters[chapter] || demoChapters[0];
    78	
    79	  if (loading) {
    80	    return (
    81	      <div className={`flex items-center justify-center h-screen ${darkMode ? 'bg-slate-900' : 'bg-white'}`}>
    82	        <motion.div animate={{ rotate: 360 }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 1 }}>
    83	          <ArrowLeft className="text-rose-400" size={32} />
    84	        </motion.div>
    85	      </div>
    86	    );
    87	  }
    88	
    89	  return (
    90	    <div className={`relative h-screen overflow-hidden ${darkMode ? 'bg-slate-900 text-slate-100' : 'bg-white text-slate-800'}`}>
    91	      {/* Top Bar */}
    92	      <motion.div
    93	        initial={false}
    94	        animate={{ y: showControls ? 0 : -80 }}
    95	        className={`absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 z-30 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${darkMode ? 'bg-slate-800/90' : 'bg-white/90'} backdrop-blur-sm border-b ${darkMode ? 'border-slate-700' : 'border-slate-100'}`}
    96	      >
    97	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    98	          <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => { handleSave(); navigate(-1); }} className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center">
    99	            <ArrowLeft size={18} />
   100	          </motion.button>
   101	          <div className="ml-1">
   102	            <p className="text-xs font-bold truncate max-w-[180px]">{book?.title || 'Reading'}</p>
   103	            <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400">{currentChapter.title}</p>
   104	          </div>
   105	        </div>
   106	        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   107	          <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => setBookmarked(!bookmarked)} className={`w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${bookmarked ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-500' : 'bg-slate-100'}`}>
   108	            <Bookmark size={16} fill={bookmarked ? 'currentColor' : 'none'} />
   109	          </motion.button>
   110	        </div>
   111	      </motion.div>
   112	
   113	      {/* Content */}
   114	      <div
   115	        ref={contentRef}
   116	        onClick={() => setShowControls(!showControls)}
   117	        className="h-full overflow-y-auto px-6 pt-20 pb-24"
   118	        style={{ fontSize: `${fontSize}px`, lineHeight: '1.8' }}
   119	      >
   120	        <h2 className="text-xl font-black mb-6">{currentChapter.title}</h2>
   121	        <p className="font-medium leading-relaxed">{currentChapter.content}</p>
   122	        <p className="font-medium leading-relaxed mt-4">{currentChapter.content}</p>
   123	        <p className="font-medium leading-relaxed mt-4">{currentChapter.content}</p>
   124	      </div>
   125	
   126	      {/* Bottom Bar */}
   127	      <motion.div
   128	        initial={false}
   129	        animate={{ y: showControls ? 0 : 80 }}
   130	        className={`absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 ${darkMode ? 'bg-slate-800/90' : 'bg-white/90'} backdrop-blur-sm border-t ${darkMode ? 'border-slate-700' : 'border-slate-100'}`}
   131	      >
   132	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   133	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   134	            <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => setDarkMode(!darkMode)} className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center">
   135	              {darkMode ? <Sun size={16} /> : <Moon size={16} />}
   136	            </motion.button>
   137	            <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => setFontSize((s) => Math.min(s + 2, 24))} className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center">
   138	              <Type size={16} />
   139	              <span className="text-[8px] absolute -top-0.5">+</span>
   140	            </motion.button>
   141	            <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => setFontSize((s) => Math.max(s - 2, 12))} className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold">
   142	              <Type size={16} />
   143	              <span className="text-[8px] absolute -top-0.5">-</span>
   144	            </motion.button>
   145	          </div>
   146	          <span className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400">{chapter + 1} / {demoChapters.length}</span>
   147	        </div>
   148	
   149	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   150	          <motion.button
   151	            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   152	            disabled={chapter === 0}
   153	            onClick={() => setChapter(chapter - 1)}
   154	            className="flex-1 py-2.5 bg-slate-100 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-1 disabled:opacity-40"
   155	          >
   156	            <ChevronLeft size={16} /> Prev
   157	          </motion.button>
   158	          <motion.button
   159	            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   160	            onClick={handleSave}
   161	            className="px-4 py-2.5 bg-rose-500 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm shadow-md"
   162	          >
   163	            Save
   164	          </motion.button>
   165	          <motion.button
   166	            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   167	            disabled={chapter >= demoChapters.length - 1}
   168	            onClick={() => setChapter(chapter + 1)}
   169	            className="flex-1 py-2.5 bg-slate-100 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-1 disabled:opacity-40"
   170	          >
   171	            Next <ChevronRight size={16} />
   172	          </motion.button>
   173	        </div>
   174	      </motion.div>
   175	    </div>
   176	  );
   177	};
   178	
   179	export default ReaderPage;
===
     1	import React, { useState } from 'react';
     2	import { useQuery } from '@apollo/client/react';
     3	import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
     4	import { useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
     5	import { motion } from 'motion/react';
     6	import { BookOpen, Play, BookOpenText } from 'lucide-react';
     7	import BookCard from '@/components/BookCard';
     8	import VideoCard from '@/components/VideoCard';
     9	import SectionHeader from '@/components/SectionHeader';
    10	
    11	const BROWSE_QUERY = gql`
    12	  query BrowseData($categoryId: ID) {
    13	    books(categoryId: $categoryId) {
    14	      id
    15	      title
    16	      coverUrl
    17	      isPremium
    18	      author
    19	      categoryId
    20	    }
    21	    videos(categoryId: $categoryId) {
    22	      id
    23	      title
    24	      thumbnailUrl
    25	      isPremium
    26	      duration
    27	    }
    28	    categories {
    29	      id
    30	      name
    31	      color
    32	    }
    33	  }
    34	`;
    35	
    36	type Tab = 'all' | 'books' | 'videos';
    37	
    38	const BrowsePage: React.FC = () => {
    39	  const location = useLocation();
    40	  const initialCategory = (location.state as any)?.categoryId;
    41	  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<Tab>('all');
    42	  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<string | null>(initialCategory || null);
    43	
    44	  const { data, loading } = useQuery(BROWSE_QUERY, { variables: { categoryId: selectedCategory } });
    45	
    46	  const books = data?.books || [];
    47	  const videos = data?.videos || [];
    48	  const categories = data?.categories || [];
    49	
    50	  const tabs: { key: Tab; label: string; icon: React.ElementType }[] = [
    51	    { key: 'all', label: 'All', icon: BookOpen },
    52	    { key: 'books', label: 'Books', icon: BookOpenText },
    53	    { key: 'videos', label: 'Videos', icon: Play },
    54	  ];
    55	
    56	  return (
    57	    <div className="px-4 pt-6 pb-4">
    58	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 mb-4">Browse</h1>
    59	
    60	      {/* Tabs */}
    61	      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
    62	        {tabs.map((tab) => (
    63	          <motion.button
    64	            key={tab.key}
    65	            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
    66	            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
    67	            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-colors ${
    68	              activeTab === tab.key ? 'bg-rose-500 text-white shadow-md shadow-rose-200' : 'bg-white text-slate-500 border border-slate-100'
    69	            }`}
    70	          >
    71	            <tab.icon size={16} />
    72	            {tab.label}
    73	          </motion.button>
    74	        ))}
    75	      </div>
    76	
    77	      {/* Categories */}
    78	      <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 mb-4 -mx-4 px-4">
    79	        <motion.button
    80	          whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
    81	          onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(null)}
    82	          className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-bold flex-shrink-0 ${
    83	            !selectedCategory ? 'bg-slate-800 text-white' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-600'
    84	          }`}
    85	        >
    86	          All
    87	        </motion.button>
    88	        {categories.map((cat: any) => (
    89	          <motion.button
    90	            key={cat.id}
    91	            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
    92	            onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(cat.id)}
    93	            className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-bold flex-shrink-0 transition-colors ${
    94	              selectedCategory === cat.id ? 'text-white shadow-sm' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-600'
    95	            }`}
    96	            style={selectedCategory === cat.id ? { backgroundColor: cat.color } : {}}
    97	          >
    98	            {cat.name}
    99	          </motion.button>
   100	        ))}
   101	      </div>
   102	
   103	      {loading && (
   104	        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-40">
   105	          <motion.div animate={{ rotate: 360 }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 1 }}>
   106	            <BookOpen className="text-rose-300" size={32} />
   107	          </motion.div>
   108	        </div>
   109	      )}
   110	
   111	      {/* Content */}
   112	      {(activeTab === 'all' || activeTab === 'books') && books.length > 0 && (
   113	        <section className="mb-6">
   114	          <SectionHeader title="Books" />
   115	          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   116	            {books.map((book: any) => (
   117	              <BookCard key={book.id} book={book} size="sm" />
   118	            ))}
   119	          </div>
   120	        </section>
   121	      )}
   122	
   123	      {(activeTab === 'all' || activeTab === 'videos') && videos.length > 0 && (
   124	        <section>
   125	          <SectionHeader title="Videos" />
   126	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
   127	            {videos.map((video: any) => (
   128	              <VideoCard key={video.id} video={video} size="md" />
   129	            ))}
   130	          </div>
   131	        </section>
   132	      )}
   133	
   134	      {!loading && books.length === 0 && videos.length === 0 && (
   135	        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-40 text-slate-400">
   136	          <BookOpen size={40} className="mb-2 opacity-30" />
   137	          <p className="text-sm font-medium">No stories found</p>
   138	        </div>
   139	      )}
   140	    </div>
   141	  );
   142	};
   143	
   144	export default BrowsePage;
[The command completed with exit code 0.]
[Current working directory: /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5]
--END AGENT OBSERVATION--
</observation>
<action>
**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
COMMAND:
cd /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5 && tail -60 src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx && echo "===" && cat src/pages/SearchPage.tsx
</action>
<observation>
**CmdOutputObservation (source=EventSource.AGENT, exit code=0, metadata={
  "exit_code": 0,
  "pid": -1,
  "username": null,
  "hostname": null,
  "working_dir": "/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5",
  "py_interpreter_path": null,
  "prefix": "",
  "suffix": "\n[The command completed with exit code 0.]"
})**
--BEGIN AGENT OBSERVATION--
        <table className="w-full text-sm">
          <thead className="bg-slate-50"><tr>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-600">Amount</th>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-600">Status</th>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-600">Reference</th>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-600">Date</th>
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            {(data?.payments || []).map((p: any) => (
              <tr key={p.id} className="border-t border-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-50/50">
                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-slate-700">${p.amount}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-3"><span className={`text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${p.status === 'success' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600' : 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-600'}`}>{p.status}</span></td>
                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-500 text-xs">{p.paystackReference || '-'}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-500 text-xs">{new Date(p.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const AdminDashboard: React.FC = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = window.location.pathname;
  const active = location.split('/').pop() || 'dashboard';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50 flex">
      <AdminSidebar active={active} />
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
        {/* Mobile header */}
        <div className="md:hidden bg-white border-b border-slate-100 px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-rose-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
              <BookOpen size={16} className="text-white" />
            </div>
            <span className="font-black text-slate-800">Admin</span>
          </div>
          <motion.button whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} onClick={() => navigate('/')} className="text-sm font-bold text-rose-500">
            Exit
          </motion.button>
        </div>
        <Routes>
          <Route path="dashboard" element={<DashboardView />} />
          <Route path="books" element={<BooksView />} />
          <Route path="videos" element={<VideosView />} />
          <Route path="categories" element={<CategoriesView />} />
          <Route path="users" element={<UsersView />} />
          <Route path="subscriptions" element={<SubscriptionsView />} />
          <Route path="payments" element={<PaymentsView />} />
          <Route path="*" element={<DashboardView />} />
        </Routes>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AdminDashboard;
===
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@apollo/client/react';
import { gql } from '@apollo/client';
import { useDebounce } from '@/hooks/use-debounce';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { Search, X, BookOpen, Play } from 'lucide-react';
import BookCard from '@/components/BookCard';
import VideoCard from '@/components/VideoCard';

const SEARCH_QUERY = gql`
  query Search($search: String) {
    books(search: $search) {
      id
      title
      coverUrl
      isPremium
      author
    }
    videos(search: $search) {
      id
      title
      thumbnailUrl
      isPremium
      duration
    }
  }
`;

const SearchPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const debouncedQuery = useDebounce(query, 300);
  const { data, loading } = useQuery(SEARCH_QUERY, { variables: { search: debouncedQuery || undefined }, skip: debouncedQuery.length < 2 });

  const books = data?.books || [];
  const videos = data?.videos || [];

  return (
    <div className="px-4 pt-6 pb-4">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 mb-4">Search</h1>

      <div className="relative mb-6">
        <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" size={18} />
        <input
          value={query}
          onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="Find books and videos..."
          className="w-full pl-11 pr-10 py-3.5 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl text-sm font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-300 focus:border-rose-300 transition-all"
        />
        {query && (
          <button onClick={() => setQuery('')} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600">
            <X size={16} />
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {loading && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-32">
          <motion.div animate={{ rotate: 360 }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 1 }}>
            <Search className="text-rose-300" size={28} />
          </motion.div>
        </div>
      )}

      {!loading && debouncedQuery.length >= 2 && (
        <>
          {books.length > 0 && (
            <section className="mb-6">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <BookOpen size={18} className="text-rose-500" />
                <h2 className="text-lg font-extrabold text-slate-800">Books</h2>
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                {books.map((book: any) => (
                  <BookCard key={book.id} book={book} size="sm" />
                ))}
              </div>
            </section>
          )}

          {videos.length > 0 && (
            <section>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <Play size={18} className="text-rose-500" />
                <h2 className="text-lg font-extrabold text-slate-800">Videos</h2>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                {videos.map((video: any) => (
                  <VideoCard key={video.id} video={video} size="md" />
                ))}
              </div>
            </section>
          )}

          {books.length === 0 && videos.length === 0 && (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-40 text-slate-400">
              <Search size={40} className="mb-2 opacity-30" />
              <p className="text-sm font-medium">No results found</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      {debouncedQuery.length < 2 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-48 text-slate-400">
          <Search size={48} className="mb-3 opacity-20" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">Type to search stories</p>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default SearchPage;

--END AGENT OBSERVATION--

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/VideoCard.tsx]
Thought: Now update VideoCard to support `size="full"` (fills its grid column):
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
import React from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { Play, Lock, Clock } from 'lucide-react';

interface VideoCardProps {
  video: {
    id: string;
    title: string;
    thumbnailUrl?: string;
    isPremium: boolean;
    duration?: number;
  };
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
}

function formatDuration(seconds: number) {
  const m = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
  const s = seconds % 60;
  return `${m}:${s.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

const VideoCard: React.FC<VideoCardProps> = ({ video, size = 'md' }) => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const sizeClasses = {
    sm: 'w-40 h-24',
    md: 'w-52 h-32',
    lg: 'w-64 h-40',
  };

  return (
    <motion.div
      whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
      onClick={() => navigate(`/video/${video.id}`)}
      className="flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer"
    >
      <div className={`${sizeClasses[size]} relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-md bg-slate-800`}>
        {video.thumbnailUrl ? (
          <img src={video.thumbnailUrl} alt={video.title} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
        ) : (
          <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-700">
            <Play className="text-white opacity-50" size={32} />
          </div>
        )}
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-white/80 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
            <Play size={18} className="text-rose-500 ml-0.5" fill="currentColor" />
          </div>
        </div>
        {video.duration !== undefined && video.duration > 0 && (
          <div className="absolute bottom-2 right-2 bg-black/60 text-white text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md flex items-center gap-1">
            <Clock size={10} />
            {formatDuration(video.duration)}
          </div>
        )}
        {video.isPremium && (
          <div className="absolute top-2 right-2 bg-amber-400 text-white p-1 rounded-full shadow-sm">
            <Lock size={12} />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 truncate w-52">{video.title}</p>
    </motion.div>
  );
};

export default VideoCard;
```
New String: ```
import React from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { Play, Lock, Clock } from 'lucide-react';

interface VideoCardProps {
  video: {
    id: string;
    title: string;
    thumbnailUrl?: string;
    isPremium: boolean;
    duration?: number;
  };
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'full';
}

function formatDuration(seconds: number) {
  const m = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
  const s = seconds % 60;
  return `${m}:${s.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

const VideoCard: React.FC<VideoCardProps> = ({ video, size = 'md' }) => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  // "full" fills its grid cell width, fixed aspect ratio
  const isFull = size === 'full';

  const fixedClasses: Record<string, string> = {
    sm: 'w-40 h-24',
    md: 'w-52 h-32',
    lg: 'w-64 h-40',
  };

  return (
    <motion.div
      whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
      onClick={() => navigate(`/video/${video.id}`)}
      className={`cursor-pointer ${isFull ? 'w-full' : 'flex-shrink-0'}`}
    >
      <div
        className={`relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-md bg-slate-800 ${
          isFull ? 'w-full aspect-video' : fixedClasses[size]
        }`}
      >
        {video.thumbnailUrl ? (
          <img src={video.thumbnailUrl} alt={video.title} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
        ) : (
          <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-700">
            <Play className="text-white opacity-50" size={32} />
          </div>
        )}
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-white/80 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
            <Play size={18} className="text-rose-500 ml-0.5" fill="currentColor" />
          </div>
        </div>
        {video.duration !== undefined && video.duration > 0 && (
          <div className="absolute bottom-2 right-2 bg-black/60 text-white text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md flex items-center gap-1">
            <Clock size={10} />
            {formatDuration(video.duration)}
          </div>
        )}
        {video.isPremium && (
          <div className="absolute top-2 right-2 bg-amber-400 text-white p-1 rounded-full shadow-sm">
            <Lock size={12} />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 line-clamp-2 leading-tight">{video.title}</p>
    </motion.div>
  );
};

export default VideoCard;
```

</action>
<observation>
The file /workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/components/VideoCard.tsx has been edited.

<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-bvz8t9wtqyv5/src/index.css]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
@layer base {
  * {
    @apply border-border;
  }

  body {
    @apply bg-background text-foreground;
  }
}
```
New String: ```
@layer base {
  * {
    @apply border-border;
  }

  body {
    @apply bg-background text-foreground;
  }

  /* Hide scrollbars globally while keeping scroll functionality */
  * {
    scrollbar-width: none; /* Firefox */
    -ms-overflow-style: none; /* IE/Edge */
  }
  *::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none; /* Chrome/Safari/Opera */
  }
}
```

</observation>
